title: 💻 Anthropic's Guide to Claude Code: Best Practices for Agentic Coding
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Anthropic's Guide to Claude Code: Best Practices for Agentic Coding : r/ClaudeAI. # Anthropic's Guide to Claude Code: Best Practices for Agentic Coding. 👉Claude Code: Best practices for agentic coding. 👉Claude Code: Best practices for agentic codingThey go into stuff like:Setting up aCLAUDE.mdto guide Claude's behavior within your repo. *   Setting up a`CLAUDE.md`to guide Claude's behavior within your repo. Debugging and iterating with Claude Code over multiple turnsTL;DR:Anthropic recommends structuring your repo to make Claude "agentic" — i.e., act more like an intelligent assistant who understands your goals, tools, and context. A lot of the power comes from writing a clear, detailed`CLAUDE.md`that explains what your code does and how Claude should help. The blog post includes real-world examples and prompt templates that work well.Just came across this great post via Alex Albert’s tweet and thought folks here would appreciate it:. Anthropic recommends structuring your repo to make Claude "agentic" — i.e., act more like an intelligent assistant who understands your goals, tools, and context. Best practices for Claude Code from Anthropic.

4.   **Update thinking configuration:** Claude 4.6 models use [adaptive thinking](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/adaptive-thinking) (`thinking: {type: "adaptive"}`) instead of manual thinking with `budget_tokens`. See [Migrating away from prefilled responses](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/prompt-engineering/claude-prompting-best-practices#migrating-away-from-prefilled-responses) for title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing #Linux - Qiita
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Batch Processing. Claude Code users often face the challenge of "wanting to execute multiple prompts sequentially" and "automating code generation with overnight batch processing." Many also need "project-specific prompt management" for their development workflows. This article provides a detailed explanation of the batch processing features added in Prompt Scheduler v1.0.2, along with real development scenarios. I want to clearly state that this is an independent personal development project with no connection whatsoever to Anthropic's Claude or Claude Code. Batch processing in Prompt Scheduler refers to **the functionality of pre-defining multiple prompts and automatically executing them in a specified order**. * Continuous prompt execution in active development projects. # Overnight batch (aggressive execution ignoring limits) \ --prompt-file \ --mode \ --ignore-approaching-limit \ --hours # Phased execution during business hours \ --prompt-file \ --mode \ --stop-at. * **Project management**: Parallel processing of multiple projects with `--prompt-file`. * **Limit processing**: Aggressive execution with `--ignore-approaching-limit`.

title: 💻 Show HN: Send Claude Code tasks to the Batch API at 50% off | Hacker News
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

| |  | | --- | | Show HN: Send Claude Code tasks to the Batch API at 50% off (github.com/s2-streamstore) | | 23 points by misker1 4 months ago | hide | past | favorite | 1 comment | | Hey HN. I built this because my Anthropic API bills were getting out of hand (spoiler: they remain high even with this, batch is not a magic bullet). So here is a small MCP that lets you send work directly to Anthropic's Batch API from inside Claude Code, for the same quality responses just 50% cheaper, results come back in ~30min-1hr. ```  How it works: you type /batch review this codebase for security issues, Claude gathers all the context, builds a self-contained prompt, ships it to the Batch API via an MCP server, and you get notified in the status bar when it's done (optional). I removed the curl | bash setup and at this stage of the project i feel more confident sharing the manual setup instructions.

title: 💻 Claude Code: Batch processing with Message Batches API | Claude Cookbook
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Batch processing with Message Batches API. Process large volumes of Claude requests asynchronously with 50% cost reduction using batches. Message Batches allow you to process large volumes of Messages requests asynchronously and cost-effectively. This cookbook demonstrates how to use the Message Batches API to handle bulk operations while reducing costs by 50%. Let's start with a simple example that demonstrates creating and monitoring a batch of message requests. `# Prepare a list of questions for batch processing. "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": question}],. print(f"Batch ID: {response.id}"). print(f"Status: {response.processing_status}"). Now let's monitor the batch processing status:. print(f" Processing: {batch_result.request_counts.processing}"). Once the batch is complete, we can retrieve and process the results:. batch = client.beta.messages.batches.retrieve(batch_id). print(f"Status: {batch.processing_status}"). for result in client.beta.messages.batches.results(batch_id):. print(f"Status: {result.result.type}"). print(f"Content: {result.result.message.content[0].text[:200]}..."). This example demonstrates more advanced usage, including error handling and processing different types of requests in a single batch including a simple message, a message with a system prompt, a multi-turn message, and a message with an image.
excerpt: # Batch processing with Message Batches API. Process large volumes of Claude requests asynchronously with 50% cost reduction using batches. Message Ba...

title: 💻 How I Batch a Full Week of Content in One Day with Claude Code
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

How I Batch a Full Week of Content in One Day with Claude Code
Dee Willis | AI Digital Products
2350 subscribers
8 likes
159 views
7 Apr 2026
► Join the HerMpire Builders Community to download the free Content Batch Day System skill + manual + implementation guide 👉 https://skool.com/digitalmpire-builders
► Tap into your 14-Day Free Skool Trial: https://www.skool.com/signup?ref=070272b1669f463f91939c76d77d798e

If you want to batch a week of content in one day with Claude, this video is your step-by-step. No code required, no tech background needed, and your content will actually sound like you because we're training it on your voice, your offers, and your audience from the jump.

I walk you through how to use the Content Batch Day System skill inside both Claude desktop and Claude Code. You can start from a topic idea, drop in a blog post URL, or upload a video transcript and it will generate Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, carousels, and community posts all in one session.

Whether you're using Claude desktop or running Claude Code off your computer, I show you both paths so you can choose what works for your setup. And everything you need to get started is completely free in the HerMpire Builders community.

What's inside this video:

- How to install the Content Batch Day System skill in Claude desktop
- How to set up the skill inside Claude Code for faster, file-based batching
- How to build your content pack (brand voice, avatar, offers) so your AI output actually sounds like you
- How to use a blog post, YouTube transcript, or topic idea as your content source
- What types of content it produces across every platform

You don't need to set this up every time. You build the content pack once, and from that point on Claude knows who you are and what you create. That's how you go from spending hours on content every week to getting it all done in one sitting.

Get the skill, the manual, and the implementation guide for free in Builders. Link above.
